description: Wisdom rules seeded at genre-proposal time from a successful reflection. Expected to be curated + extended via future LEARN.5 wisdom-rule proposals as sessions in this genre accumulate.

rules.rule: The player must be able to rotate the tower smoothly to align gaps with the falling ball.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Each level should increase in difficulty by adding more obstacles and fewer gaps.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Visual effects like flashes or particle effects should be used to enhance feedback when a level is cleared.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Unlockable ball skins provide a sense of progression and customization for players.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre

rules.rule: Sound effects for ball bounces, level clears, and game over events should be included to enhance the audio experience.
rules.why: Seeded from a successful user session in this genre
